required_preferences.fact: Frequently initiates spontaneous voice and video calls with her sister at various times, prioritizing flexibility and availability to support her during the move—text convos become less routine as urgent logistics dominate

supersedes.fact: Texts her younger sister throughout the day, calls only after 9 pm when both can vent

required_preferences.fact: No longer holds uninterrupted morning work blocks — now schedules work and meetings at all hours, including late nights, to coordinate with deal teams across global time zones

supersedes.fact: Blocks two hours every morning for uninterrupted deal documentation — refuses meeting requests before 11 am during active projects

required_preferences.fact: Starts every morning reviewing her calendar and to-do list for the day — never checks email before breakfast
Keeps a headache journal tracking triggers and remedies — avoids over-the-counter medication unless symptoms interfere with work
Joins a bi-weekly virtual support group for professionals in long-distance relationships, seeking community and advice during her partner's frequent absences
Blocks out at least one full weekend over the next two months to travel to Boston and help her sister settle in, pausing most work and social commitments during that period

persona: A junior corporate lawyer at a multinational firm specializing in mergers and acquisitions
